global.description: The ad features a modern product display with promotional text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a product with a special sale and free shipping offer.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: product display
elements.description: A stylized representation of a shelf with three compartments, showcasing a modern design.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The logo 'LuxShelf' appears prominently at the top, featuring a clean and modern font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, bright badge labeled 'SALE' positioned at the top right corner, drawing attention.

elements.label: favorite pick text
elements.description: Text stating 'Your next favorite pick' in a bold, friendly font, located centrally below the product display.

elements.label: shipping info
elements.description: Additional text 'Free shipping over $25' in a smaller font, placed directly below the favorite pick text.

elements.label: shelf icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing a shelf, located to the left of the product display.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Book now' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: The price '€29.99' displayed in a clear, bold font, located just above the 'Book now' button.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold accents, product display, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the product display is center, with body text below and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, SALE, Your next favorite pick, Free shipping over $25, €29.99, Book now
